'''Keelen Ma''' was a [[Mrlssi]],<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> who was the chair of the [[Republic Measures & Standards Bureau]] in the years leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. From the city of [[Mennaa]] on [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]], Ma commented on the issue of calendar reform for [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]].

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|45|life/13228_2.html|RM&S; Debates Calendar Reform}} {{1st}}
